ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* User's biography or about section */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* User's birthdate */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is verified */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Artist who released the album */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "album_cover_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover image */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label of the album */,
  "track_list" TEXT /* JSON array of track names */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the album in minutes */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the album contains explicit content */,
  "upc" TEXT /* Universal Product Code for the album */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the album is deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-100) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review left by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the rating is anonymous */,
  "rating_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the rating (e.g., for verified users or critics) */,
  "is_updated" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the rating has been updated */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_ratings" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating for the album */,
  "num_ratings" INTEGER /* Number of ratings for the album */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the album */,
  "num_listeners" INTEGER /* Number of unique listeners for the album */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score based on various factors (e.g., number of ratings, reviews, listens) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_album_ratings" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "num_albums_rated" INTEGER /* Number of albums rated by the user */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by the user */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews given by the user */,
  "last_rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the genre is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Artist's biography or about section */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's official website */,
  "social_media_urls" TEXT /* JSON array of social media URLs */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the artist is verified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the artist is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_genres" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_artists" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id", "artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_history" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the rating was anonymous */,
  "rating_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the rating (e.g., for verified users or critics) */,
  "is_updated" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the rating has been updated */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_history_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_followers" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date the follower started following the user */,
  "is_mutual" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the follow is mutual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "follower_id")
)
